$comment: Generated by docs/scripts/build-manual.mjs from user-workflows.md. The owa-robot-test skill reads this to drive each W-xx path and mark the coverage-matrix rows each one proves. Do not edit by hand.

workflows.title: Switch between the main pages
steps: Click a header tab — the window switches to that page in place.
Slide Editor only opens when a slide document is selected; otherwise the app shows an alert ("No slide selected") and stays put. Select a document in the left list first (W-03).

workflows.title: Present a slide from a document
steps: In the left column, click a document in the Documents (ឯកសារ) list. It highlights, and its slides appear as thumbnails in the middle Documents tab.
Double-click a slide thumbnail. The slide goes live: it appears on the mini screen, and the live item is marked highlighted (on-screen indicator).
To step through slides with the keyboard, click once in the thumbnail area, then use Arrow keys / PageUp / PageDown; Space toggles the focused slide.
To remove the slide from the screen, press F8 (Clear Slide — លុបស្លាយ) or click the matching clear button under the mini screen.

workflows.title: Auto-play slides on a timer
steps: Open a document's slides (W-03 step 1).
Click the stopwatch icon in the Documents-tab footer — the auto-play widget expands.
Type the interval in seconds, then click play. Slides advance on the timer.
Click pause to stop, or the red ✕ to close the widget.

workflows.title: Present song lyrics
steps: In the left column, click a song in the Lyrics (អក្សរភ្លេង) list — the middle area switches to the Lyrics tab and shows its verses.
Double-click a verse to send it to the screen.
Press F8 / the clear button to take it down.

workflows.title: Look up and present a Bible verse
steps: Press Ctrl+B (or click Bible Lookup / ស្វែងរកព្រះគម្ពីរ in the header). The lookup opens as a popup dialog.

The input is a step-by-step picker: type the first letters of the book (e.g. Joh) and click the book, then pick the chapter, then the verse. Press Tab to auto-complete the current part; Escape clears the input.
The verse renders in the preview panel. Double-click it to present.
Close the dialog with the red ✕ button or Ctrl+Q.
Press F9 (Clear Bible — លុបព្រះគម្ពីរ) to take the verse off screen.
The presented verse also appears in the Bibles tab (middle column) and the Bibles list (right column) for re-presenting later.

workflows.title: Style the on-screen Bible text
steps: Open the middle Bibles (ព្រះគម្ពីរ) tab.
Open its settings split — the Appearance and Text Shadow cards.
Adjust a control (size, color, shadow); the mini screen updates live.

workflows.title: Set the background (color / image / video / web)
steps: At the bottom of the middle column, click the thin Background (ផ្ទៃខាងក្រោយ) bar — the panel expands to show its tabs.

Pick a tab: Colors / Images / Videos / Cameras / Web (ពណ៌ / រូបភាព / វីដេអូ / កាមេរ៉ា / វេបសាយ). - Colors: click a swatch. If the color could clash with the text, the app asks whether to adjust the text color too — choose Ok or Cancel. - Images / Videos: double-click an item to make it the live background. - Cameras: pick a connected camera device. - Web: click a saved page, or + to add one (opens the Web Editor, W-15).
The live background's tab shows a * prefix (e.g. *Videos).
Press F7 (Clear Background) to remove it.

workflows.title: Play audio, and foreground extras (countdown, clock, marquee bottom…)
Control what the audience sees (mini screen + clears)
Read the Bible (full references, versions)
steps: Click the Bible Reader tab.
Type a reference — here a full reference like John 3:16 resolves straight to the verse. The picker keys still work (Tab complete, Escape clear, Ctrl+Escape clear one part).
Switch the Bible version from the header dropdown — the text re-renders.
Recent lookups appear as history entries; click one to jump back.
Double-click a verse to present it.

workflows.title: Search the whole Bible (Bible Find)
steps: In the Bible Reader (or the lookup dialog), open the advanced lookup toggle — a second panel ("Bible Online Lookup") appears beside the picker.
Type your search words. Matching verses list page by page; click the page numbers to browse.
Click a result to open that verse.

workflows.title: Cross references
steps: With a verse open, open its cross references view — related passages are listed; click one to read it.
AI-generated cross references require an API key configured in Settings; without one, only the built-in references appear.

workflows.title: Keep Bible notes
steps: In the right column (Presenter) or the Reader, switch to the Notes (កំណត់ត្រាព្រះគម្ពីរ) sub-tab.
Open a note for editing — the Bible Note editor opens in its own window.
Type your note and save (Ctrl+S).

workflows.title: Create and edit slides / lyrics / web backgrounds
steps: Select a slide document, then click the Slide Editor header tab.
Left: the slide list — click to select; right-click to add / duplicate / delete; drag to reorder.

Canvas: click a box to select it; drag to move; drag the handles to resize; double-click a text box to type into it; Ctrl+Enter focuses the canvas. (From the Presenter, right-click a slide → Edit ↗ opens this editor in its own window, focused on that slide.)
Add new boxes/images from the tools panel (click, or drag onto the canvas).
Save with Ctrl+S.

workflows.title: Settings: language, theme, fonts, folders
steps: Click the gear (ការកំណត់) in the header — Settings opens in its own window.

General tab: - Language: click Khmer or English — the whole UI switches immediately. - Theme: system / light / dark. - Font family: the font used for on-screen text. A font marked (Missing) is configured but not installed on this computer. - Directories: where documents, lyrics, and bibles are stored on disk. - Reset buttons (Reset All Child Directories / Reset Widgets Size / Clear All Settings): each asks for confirmation first — these erase configuration; use with care.
Bible tab: search available Bible versions, download new ones, enable/disable downloaded ones.
Click Apply Settings (top-right) to apply — the app windows reload.

workflows.title: Use more than one screen (multi-screen)
steps: Right-click an empty area of the mini-screen panel and choose Add New Screen — a second preview card appears with its own number and color.
Each card targets its own physical display (W-10, the Display button) and has its own show/hide, clears, transitions, and lock.
Content goes to every selected screen. Right-click a card to Select / Deselect it, or Solo to make it the only selected one.
You can also drag a slide, background item, or foreground Show button and drop it on one specific card to present it on that screen only.
While a Bible verse is live, the card's right-click menu offers Set Line Sync to keep verse highlighting in sync across screens.
Right-click a card → Delete removes a screen you no longer need (the first screen can't be deleted while it is the only one).
